name: Flower Cardian Paulownia
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>花札衛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カーディアン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>桐</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－
desc: While you control a Level 11 or lower "Flower Cardian" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Normal or Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except "Flower Cardian" monsters. When this card is targeted for an attack: You can negate the attack, end the Battle Phase, then draw 1 card.
mnst_eff: While you control a Level 11 or lower "Flower Cardian" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Normal or Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except "Flower Cardian" monsters. When this card is targeted for an attack: You can negate the attack, end the Battle Phase, then draw 1 card.
eff: While you control a Level 11 or lower "Flower Cardian" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Normal or Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except "Flower Cardian" monsters. When this card is targeted for an attack: You can negate the attack, end the Battle Phase, then draw 1 card.

sets.set: Dragons of Legend: The Complete Series

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Normal Summons to archetype specific monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
